case_title: JOSEPH DICK VS. LA GALLERIA HOA

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $250.00) SERVED NOV-20-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH DICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GEORGE LEONARD, PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-28-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH DICK. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA MARGUERITE HUTCHINSON, DIRECTOR, TREASURER. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN FINDS THAT AN ATTORNEY CANNOT REPRESENT AN ENTITY UNLESS ENTITY IS SOLELY COMPRISED OF ATTORNEYS. DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA CANNOT SEND A ATTORNEY HOA MEMBER ON IT'S BEHALF. MATTER CONTINUED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SENT APPROPRIATE REPRESENTATION FOR THIS COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA
